summary: Rubikon Center operators conducted strikes in the Donbas and Krasny Liman direction on March 7, destroying 88 Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel and engaging in FPV air defense against fixed-wing UAVs. ZALA Lancet operators successfully targeted group enemy positions despite electronic warfare interference, using a single loitering munition to strike multiple targets at their most vulnerable moment. The Rubicon Center’s air defense units have intercepted over 1,500 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, with 75% belonging to just 11 models including Leleka-100, Furya, and others. Meanwhile, Lasar’s Group NSU repelled mechanized assaults by the enemy in the Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions, destroying enemy tanks with support from Azov Corps and 9th Army Corps units.
